payload.answer: I saved a reference to the URL with your stated reason, but I could not extract article content because the fetch failed with a 404 network error.

entity_resolution.reason: The article content could not be fetched due to a 404 network error, so only the user-provided URL and reason are safe to store.

memory_cards.statement: The user wants to remember the article at https://example.com/missing because it may be useful for memory architecture.

details: Stored URL reference and user-provided reason only.
Did not store any claims about the article content because the fetch failed.

repair_options: Provide a working URL or archived copy.
